sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
HIAL a’ foillseachadh aithisg bhliadhnail airson 2024/25. Tha Puirt-adhair na Gàidhealtachd ’s nan Eilean Earranta (HIAL) air a aithisg bhliadhnail is cunntasan as ùire fhoillseachadh airson na bliadhna ionmhais 2024/25.

Research: Comparing fuel pumps to electric vehicle public chargers. An analysis that shows there are more electric vehicle (EV) public chargers than fuel pumps across the UK.

Health service to save millions with boost to electrify NHS fleet. Switching the NHS vehicle fleet to electric will save the health service millions and help to decarbonise 460 million miles of travel each year.

sections.heading: Context
sections.content: Transport and infrastructure decisions shape how passengers and freight reach Scottish and UK airports. For historical context on aviation infrastructure and industrial development, see the linked research volumes.
